calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Megan Benton, Esq., Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (916) 329-7966 mbenton@orrick.com for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff's counsel submits on the Court's tentaiver ruling, Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RE-VOLV MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm contractual arbitration award" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
